candidates.why: Only explicit R&D expense label present.

variables.notes: Mapped to the only explicit R&D line. It appears in the supplemental section below operating profit, so it was not also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost bucket that may include non-interest items; less preferred than granular interest rows.

candidates.why: Gain item; exclude.

variables.notes: Selected granular recurring financing-cost rows and excluded broader finance-cost totals and swap valuation/gain rows. Avoided the duplicated generic label 'Interest expense' to prevent ambiguity/double counting.

candidates.row_label: Owners of the Parent Company Continuing operations

Income statement attribution row, not balance sheet equity.
Generic equity line, but owner-attributable line is more precise.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the Parent Company
candidates.why: Best match because BE should exclude non-controlling interests when possible.
Acceptable fallback, but less preferred if owner-attributable equity exists.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the Parent Company

variables.notes: Used the owner-attributable equity line to avoid any potential double counting with minority interest.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation row and appears empty; not preferred versus balance-sheet NCI.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Not minority interest balance.

variables.notes: No non-controlling interest/minority interest balance sheet line is present. Since BE uses 'Equity attributable to owners of the Parent Company', MIB is set to empty to avoid double counting.
